title: Jinja2 Built-in Filters
content:
This file provides a comprehensive set of built-in filters for Jinja2 templates. These filters can be used with the `|` operator to manipulate data within templates.

**Key Filters:**

*   `ignore_case(value)`: Converts strings to lowercase for case-insensitive comparisons.
*   `make_attrgetter(...)`: Creates a callable to access attributes of an object, supporting dot notation and integers for list indices.
*   `make_multi_attrgetter(...)`: Similar to `make_attrgetter` but can access multiple attributes separated by commas.
*   `do_forceescape(value)`: Enforces HTML escaping on a value.
*   `do_urlencode(value)`: Quotes data for use in URLs.
*   `do_replace(s, old, new, count)`: Replaces occurrences of a substring with another.
*   `do_upper(s)`: Converts a string to uppercase.
*   `do_lower(s)`: Converts a string to lowercase.
*   `do_items(value)`: Returns an iterator over the key-value pairs of a mapping.
*   `do_xmlattr(d, autospace)`: Creates an SGML/XML attribute string from a dictionary.
*   `do_capitalize(s)`: Capitalizes the first character of a string and makes the rest lowercase.
*   `do_title(s)`: Converts a string to title case.
*   `do_dictsort(value, case_sensitive, by, reverse)`: Sorts a dictionary by key or value.
*   `do_sort(value, reverse, case_sensitive, attribute)`: Sorts an iterable.
*   `do_unique(value, case_sensitive, attribute)`: Returns unique items from an iterable.
*   `do_min(...)`: Returns the smallest item in a sequence.
*   `do_max(...)`: Returns the largest item in a sequence.
*   `do_default(value, default_value, boolean)`: Provides a default value if the original value is undefined or evaluates to false.
*   `sync_do_join(value, d, attribute)`: Concatenates strings in a sequence with a separator.
*   `do_join(...)`: Async version of `sync_do_join`.
*   `do_center(value, width)`: Centers a string within a given width.
*   `sync_do_first(seq)`: Returns the first item of a sequence.
*   `do_first(...)`: Async version of `sync_do_first`.
*   `do_last(seq)`: Returns the last item of a sequence.
*   `do_random(seq)`: Returns a random item from a sequence.
*   `do_filesizeformat(value, binary)`: Formats a file size into a human-readable string.
*   `do_pprint(value)`: Pretty prints a variable for debugging.
*   `do_urlize(value, trim_url_limit, nofollow, target, rel, extra_schemes)`: Converts URLs in text into clickable links.
*   `do_indent(s, width, first, blank)`: Indents each line of a string.
*   `do_truncate(s, length, killwords, end, leeway)`: Truncates a string.
*   `do_wordwrap(s, width, break_long_words, wrapstring, break_on_hyphens)`: Wraps a string to a given width.

**Usage Example:**

```html+jinja
{{ my_string|upper }}
{{ my_list|sort }}
{{ my_dict|dictsort }}
{{ my_url|urlencode }}
```
